metadata.title: Premium Wedding Packages | Smart Shaadi
metadata.description: Browse curated destination wedding packages across India — palaces, beaches, plantations and hill estates, with transparent pricing and full inclusions.

list.heading: Premium Packages
list.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No packages yet} one {# curated package} other {# curated packages}} across India's destination venues

empty.title: No packages match those filters
empty.body: Try widening the guest count or clearing a filter to see more of the collection.

detail.subtitle: {city} · {vendor}
detail.priceNote: Indicative price. Final quote depends on dates, guest count and menu.
detail.placeholderNotice: This is preview inventory — we're confirming this venue as a partner. Send an enquiry to check availability and we'll follow up with a quote.

enquiry.messagePlaceholder: Tell the venue about your dates, guest count and what matters most to you.
enquiry.tooShort: Please write at least 10 characters so the venue can respond usefully.
enquiry.sentBody: The venue team will respond with availability and a detailed quote.

metadata.title: After the Wedding | Smart Shaadi
metadata.description: Honeymoon planning, home setup, legal name change, gifting registries, counselling and financial planning — the services couples need after the wedding.
